title: Kidde Smoke Alarm with Optical Sensor Technology (2030-DSR)
features: Battery Operated: The smoke alarm is powered by a 9V battery, which is included as standard.
Optical Sensor Technology: Utilizes an optical sensor for smoke detection, providing reliable and accurate alerts.
Hush Button: Equipped with a hush button feature to temporarily silence nuisance alarms caused by cooking or steam.
Easy Installation: Designed for simple installation, suitable for most locations in the home, particularly bedrooms and living areas.
description: The Kidde 2030-DSR Optical Smoke Alarm is a battery-powered device designed for easy installation and use throughout the home. Featuring a 9V battery and optical sensor for effective smoke detection, it includes a 'hush' button to silence nuisance alarms caused by cooking or steam. Ideal for bedrooms, living areas, and hallways, the 2030-DSR ensures reliable fire safety with its straightforward functionality and user-friendly design.
